ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device category */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device category (e.g., DVR, non-DVR, thin client) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device category */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., electronic, electrical, mechanical) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "launch_year" INTEGER /* Year the device was launched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES device_manufacturers ("manufacturer_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which energy consumption data is recorded */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption value */,
  "consumption_unit" TEXT /* Unit of energy consumption (e.g., kWh, TWh) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the energy consumption data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which purchase data is recorded */,
  "purchase_count" INTEGER /* Number of devices purchased in that year */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Average price of each device */,
  "market_region" TEXT /* Region where the devices were purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_purchases_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_energy_consumption" (
  "regional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regional energy consumption record */,
  "region" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which energy consumption data is recorded */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption value */,
  "consumption_unit" TEXT /* Unit of energy consumption (e.g., kWh, TWh) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_energy_consumption_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_accessed_page" TEXT /* Page the user last accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_tec" (
  "tec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TEC record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which TEC data is recorded */,
  "tec" REAL /* Total energy consumption value */,
  "tec_unit" TEXT /* Unit of total energy consumption (e.g., kWh, TWh) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the TEC data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_tec_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_page" TEXT /* Page the user accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device category */,
  "launch_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was launched */,
  "discontinued_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_models_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
